74752.subject: The Onchain Equity Bull
74752.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/eaa70932-7ce4-467e-b338-a662ed575d6a/0xR_NL_Banner_Heading_Wordmark.jpg?t=1776775276)
Caption: 

Gm, and happy Thursday!

Kevin Warsh’s first FOMC set the town hawkish, guiding for a firm stance on price stability and a higher-for-longer policy regime, with risk assets selling off modestly on the back of this.

Meanwhile, onchain equities are in a bull, with spot volumes reaching new all-time highs. Whether it’s trading, leverage, or borrowing, this sector shows growing traction. Enjoy!

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/42e942ec-f31d-4957-8722-a3ac7b121e1e/0xR_NL_Market_Update.png?t=1767631151) [Market Update]
Caption: 

Wednesday welcomed Kevin Warsh’s first FOMC as Chairman of the Federal Reserve, where all 12 on the committee voted to keep rates steady at 3.5% to 3.75%. Perhaps the more important takeaway from this FOMC was not the level of the FFR, but rather, the language used by the new Chairman to deliver it. Rather than letting liquid markets respond to the Fed, Warsh guided towards a committee that will endeavor to let the Fed respond to liquid markets instead.

“Financial market prices are probably the most important source of information to guide central bankers,” Warsh said, adding, “But when all the financial markets are doing is reflecting back what we've said, then we're taking the most important source of information, and we're being blind to it.” 

Beyond this, the dot plot points to a “higher-for-longer” regime, with an increasing share of the committee projecting a hike this year. The plot pointed to easing and cuts just a few months ago. 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/86217312-d5d0-4375-ad94-eede903144a2/image.png?t=1781787037)
Caption: Source: [Federal Reserve](https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/files/fomcprojtabl20260617.pdf)

The tone was set firmly that price stability remains the goal of the Fed, and the policy lever will be used accordingly to achieve this. Markets sold off modestly on the back of this, with crypto leading to the downside. While the Nasdaq and the S&P 500 traded down 0.3% and 0.8%, respectively, BTC was down 1.9%, with the majority of crypto sectors moving even lower on the day. 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/1cda3432-5053-4b85-bdfe-6e824d2f52f1/image.png?t=1781787037)
Caption: 

Crypto markets still show signs of stress, and STRC traded down to fresh lows of $89, now paying an effective dividend yield of 12.9%. For MSTR, the credit spread continues to widen. While the instrument offered an attractive Sharpe of 4 and volatility

74751.subject: Re: Svadobná výzdoba
74751.body:
Zdravím Oleg,

Určite áno, mali by ste čas doobedu?

Ďakujem

S pozdravom

Lenka Gattiker

Dňa št 18. 6. 2026 o 15:33 Oleg Novosadov <novosadovoleg@gmail.com>
napísala(a):

> Dobry ,
>
> Chcel by som sa spytat ci mate este volny termin na 26.07.2026, a ked Ano,
> ta potom mohli by sme zajtra stretnut?
>
> вт, 19 трав. 2026 р. о 12:09 Posh Posh Weddings <info@poshposh.sk> пише:
>
>> Zdravíme nevestu💍🤍,
>>
>> Ďakujeme veľmi pekne za vašu správu.. Termín svadby máme ešte voľný a
>> veľmi radi budeme súčasťou vašej svadby.🤍
>>
>> Spravidla sa s klientami stretávame osobne v showroome v Rozhanovciach
>> (kúsok od Košíc) kde si spolu vieme vyskladať svadobnú výzdobu a na základe
>> toho vytvoriť cenovú ponuku na mieru pre vás ak by ste mali záujem prosím
>> navrhnite deň a čas kedy by vám to najviac vyhovovalo aby sa časovo radi
>> prispôsobíme vášmu času. Poprípade, ak sme mimo Košíc či Prešova, radi si s
>> Vami dohodneme videohovor. Prosím navrhnite deň a čas, ktorý by Vám
>> vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez víkend aj vo večerných hodinách. 🙂
>> Najbližsie voľne termíny máme ešte aj tento týždeň. Forme stretnutia sa
>> radi prispôsobíme Vám, čo je pre Vás praktickejšie ☺️
>>
>> Budeme sa tešiť na prípadnú spoluprácu s Vami.
>>
>> S pozdravom
>>
>> Lenka Gattiker,
>> Vaša osobná posh asistentka
>>
>>

74515.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — June 14
74515.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-14-oleh-bezuhlyi-akqxf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BmbZ4FC4IQ0mg0XDN2T%2BrWg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3vrdyj7E8K3ck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqe0o02q~q3-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqe0o02q-q3
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: A July 1 MiCA cutoff looms for millions of EU crypto users while a DPRK-linked $36M hack and a UK naval seizure exposing USDT sanctions evasion show that crypto's geopolitical risk is no longer theoretical. 🚨 Millions of EU Crypto Users Face Exchange Cutoff as MiCA Deadline Hits in Days On July 1, 2026, the temporary operating permission that allowed crypto companies to serve EU customers while awaiting a full MiCA license expires — and exchanges, brokers, and wallet services that have not secured authorization must immediately cut off access to European users with no further grace period. CryptoSlate reports that the deadline creates a live operational crisis for ordinary investors who may lose access to their funds, positions, or platforms overnight, with little notice from providers scrambling to reach compliance. Read full story 💀 Humanity Protocol's $36M Hack Linked to Suspected North Korean Hackers Cybersecurity firm Quantstamp has attributed the $36 million breach of Humanity Protocol to suspected North Korean threat actors, identifying a fraudulent phishing email spoofing crypto exchange Bithumb as the attack's primary entry vector. The incident adds another eight-figure sum to the growing ledger of assets stolen by DPRK-affiliated hacking groups, which have systematically targeted blockchain projects to fund state programs operating under international sanctions. More details ⚖️ CFTC No-Action Letter Opens First Legal Path for Digital Commodity Perpetuals in the US The CFTC issued a staff no-action letter that clears a legal runway for perpetual futures contracts on digital commodities to operate within the United States — a product category that has until now existed almost exclusively at offshore venues to sidestep regulatory uncertainty. The guidance provides immediate operational clarity for US-domiciled exchanges and their institutional clients, who have long been unable to offer the perpetual swap structures that dominate global crypto derivatives volumes. Read more 📊 SEC Proposes Reg NMS Rule Changes That Could Reshape Tokenized Stock Trading The SEC has proposed rescinding Rules 611 and 610e of Regulation NMS — the order-protection and access rules that have governed US equity market structure for two decades — in a move with substantial downstream implications for how tokenized st

74347.subject: cenová ponuka
74347.body:
Dobrý deň Vám prajem, 

na základe nášho stretnutia Vám posielam spracovanú cenovú ponuku.

Cenová ponuka je orientačná a nezáväzná, čokoľvek sa môže zmeniť, upraviť, pridať, ubrať. Výsledná suma vždy závisí od konkrétnych predstáv a požiadavok klienta, od druhu a množstva použitých živých a všetkých ostatných materiálov. 

Štandardne pracujeme tak, že takto dopredu pred svadbou pripravujem ponuku, ktorá je orientačná. Ťažko dopredu určiť presnú sumu a takisto ani Vy nemusíte ešte teraz presne vedieť koľko príde nakoniec hostí, ako sa bude sedieť, koľko stolov budete potrebovať, ako sa môžu zmeniť Vaše predstavy. :-)
Zhruba dva týždne pred svadbou, ako som už spomínala, prípadne podľa potreby skôr sa pripraví predbežná kalkulácia, ktorá sa vyrátava už na základe reálnych počtov položiek a požiadavok a v neposlednom rade počtu hostí.
Všetko je to v prvom rade o komunikácii. Snažím sa jednať s ľuďmi fér, seriózne a k práci pristupovať zodpovedne.
Myslím, že sa dá na mňa v čomkoľvek obrátiť a spoľahnúť. 

Kľudne si ponuku preštudujte a ak by ste mali akékoľvek otázky, chceli sa na čokoľvek opýtať, ak by ste chceli niečo zmeniť, pridať, ubrať, prípadne nastaviť si výšku budgetu kľudne sa na mňa obráťte, rada Vám odpoviem, pomôžem, poradím. 
Všetko som pripravila tak, aby to bolo čo najjednoduchšie pochopiteľné. Ak by bolo čokoľvek nejasné, pýtajte sa.

Ak som na niečo zabudla kľudne ma doplňte. 😉

Budem čakať za Vašou spätnou väzbou.

Prajem krásny deň.



S pozdravom / Best regards

Bc. Lucia Ortutová
Event manager/wedding coordinator

+421 907 382 402
www.dekoracnyservis.sk
info@dekoracnyservis.sk

74315.subject: Minebea, Výplatná páska/Payslip 05/2026
74315.body: Milí kolegovia, v prílohe tejto správy sa nachádza Vaša výplatná páska. Na otvorenie výplatnej pásky použite posledné 4 číslice vášho rodného čísla (za lomkou). Ak ste si heslo zmenili, použite nové heslo. _________________________________________________ Dear all, attached to this e-mail is your payslip. To open your payslip, use the last 4 digits of your birth number (after the slash). If you have changed your password, please use the new one.
